agents.ocr: Text extraction from images or documents
agents.speech: Transcription and acoustic analysis with Groq Whisper
agents.nlp: Intent analysis, summaries and threat scoring
agents.osint: Correlation of phone numbers, accounts and social networks
agents.correlation: Predictive pattern analysis and modus operandi
agents.seal: Digital custody and sealing on zkSYS blockchain
agents.alert: Notification and escalation to police authorities
agents.respond: TRJ code generation and citizen response

landing.heroSubtitle: IntelExtorsión integrates autonomous AI agents, NLP processing, OCR, audio analysis, and Web3 blockchain for receiving, correlating, and preserving digital evidence.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Eight autonomous agents work together to analyze, correlate, and preserve every piece of evidence.
landing.feature1Desc: Intake, OCR, Speech, NLP, Correlation, OSINT, Risk and Alert Agent with LangGraph and LLM.
landing.feature2Desc: Pattern correlation, criminal network detection and real-time risk scoring.
landing.feature3Desc: Immutable evidence on zkSYS Tanenbaum Testnet with SHA-256 hash, DID and tokens.
landing.channelsDesc: Use WhatsApp, Telegram or Discord to send your extortion report. The bot guides you step by step and generates a tracking code without collecting any personal data.
landing.whyNoWalletDesc: WhatsApp, Telegram and Discord channels are anonymous reporting channels: citizens don't need to connect a wallet or create an identity. The system receives the report, processes it with forensic AI, and generates a tracking code (e.g. TRJ-4X9K). The DApp Web3 (below) is for those who want to custody evidence with judicial traceability and blockchain signature — that does require Pali Wallet.
landing.channelWhatsappDesc: Send a direct message to the WhatsApp bot. Accepts text, images of extortion letters and voice notes.
landing.channelTelegramDesc: Find the bot on Telegram and send your report. Supports text, audio and documents. Instant responses.
landing.channelDiscordDesc: Join the server and use the report channel. Ideal for reports with multiple attachments.
landing.step1Desc: Write, send a photo or audio with the details of the extortion.
landing.step2Desc: The bot generates a unique TRJ-XXXX code for anonymous tracking.
landing.step3Desc: Send your code whenever you want to know what's happening with your case.
landing.web3Desc: Your channel to submit evidence with judicial traceability, using a Decentralized Identity (DID) that allows you to be pseudonymous — identifiable to DIVINCRI La Libertad only if you authorize it, without exposing your civil identity.
landing.web3Card1Desc: Connect your Pali Wallet V2 and sign a cryptographic challenge to generate your DID. No name, ID or email is collected.
landing.web3Card2Desc: Upload your file. SHA-256 hash, UTC timestamp, MIME type and technical metadata are captured. The hash is sealed on the zkSYS blockchain.
landing.web3Card3Desc: Download the digital report compatible with article 158-B of the Peruvian CPP: hash, timestamp, DID, block number and system signature.
landing.web3CtaDesc: Connect your wallet from the Citizen Portal to access decentralized forensic custody with full judicial traceability.
landing.footer: Police intelligence platform. Cutting-edge technology against extortion.

portal.title: IntelExtorsión
portal.subtitle: Citizen reporting platform · Trujillo, Peru
portal.connectWalletDesc: Use Pali Wallet V2 to connect anonymously. A Decentralized Identity (DID) will be automatically generated and linked to your report.
portal.privacyNote: No personal data is collected. Your identity remains 100% anonymous under W3C cryptography.
portal.walletNotDetected: Pali Wallet not detected. Install it from https://paliwallet.com
portal.wrongNetwork: Please switch to zkSYS Tanenbaum Testnet (Chain ID 57057)
portal.feature1Desc: Your identity is never stored or publicly exposed.
portal.feature2Desc: A decentralized identifier is generated when connecting.
portal.feature3Desc: Each report is sealed and protected on zkSYS.
portal.clusterDesc: Our correlation agents have identified an active extortion pattern matching your case in Trujillo. Your evidence has been immutably linked to strengthen the criminal investigation.
portal.noEvidences: No evidences registered with this DID.
portal.uploadEvidenceDesc: Audio, chat, extortionist number or documents.
portal.forensicCustodyDesc1: Each evidence receives an immutable SHA-256 hash.
portal.forensicCustodyDesc2: The hash is sealed on the zkSYS blockchain (testnet).
portal.forensicCustodyDesc3: A PDF report compatible with art. 158-B of the CPP is generated.
portal.noEvidencesDesc: You haven't registered any extortion reports with this DID yet. Your first evidence will be sealed on the zkSYS blockchain.
portal.glossaryDIDDesc: Unique identifier under W3C DID Core 1.0 standard generated from your Pali Wallet. It does not store names, emails or personal data. Your report is pseudonymous but verifiable before DIVINCRI if you authorize it.
portal.glossarySealDesc: Your evidence is protected with an immutable SHA-256 hash registered on zkSYS Tanenbaum Testnet. No one can alter, delete or manipulate the evidence — not even administrators or the police.
portal.glossaryClustersDesc: AI agents correlate phones, bank accounts and linguistic patterns. If your report matches others in Trujillo, an active criminal cluster or network is automatically detected.
portal.faqQ1: How can I check the status of my case?
portal.faqA1: Each report receives a unique TRJ-XXXX code. Use it in "My Evidences" → "Audit AI & Web3" or in the Tracking Portal.
portal.faqQ2: Can the police see my private key?
portal.faqA2: No. Connecting Pali Wallet only signs your report anonymously. The system never accesses your private keys or funds.
portal.faqQ3: What is the forensic PDF report?
portal.faqA3: Digital document with SHA-256 hash, timestamp, DID, block number and system signature. Compatible with article 158-B of the Peruvian CPP for traceable digital evidence.
portal.chatWelcome:
🛡️ *Welcome to the IntelExtorsión Citizen Portal*

I am your secure assistant for registering extortion reports. Your evidence is immutably sealed on the zkSYS blockchain and your identity remains 100% anonymous under W3C cryptography.

📋 *What can you do here?*
• Register a new extortion report
• Attach images, audio or documents as evidence
• Track an existing case with your TRJ-XXXX code

Press the button below to start securely.
portal.chatIngestionActivated:
📝 *Ingestion Assistant Activated.*

Please write in detail what happened in your next message (you can attach screenshots, audio or documents). Make sure to include key data such as extortion phone numbers or account numbers if you have them.
portal.chatIngestionActivatedShort:
📝 *Ingestion Assistant Activated.*

Please write in detail what happened in your next message. You can attach screenshots, audio or documents as evidence.

💡 *Tip:* Include key data like extortion phone numbers, account numbers, amounts or dates.

*If you wish to cancel at any time, type "cancel".*
portal.chatGreeting:
👋 Hello! I am your IntelExtorsión virtual assistant.

To start a secure extortion report, please press the "Start Secure Report" button below or type "report" to activate the ingestion assistant.
portal.chatReportCanceled:
❌ *Report canceled.*

The ingestion assistant has been deactivated and your session is clean. What would you like to do today? You can press one of the quick buttons below or write me your query.
portal.chatWaitingDetails:
📝 *Assistant Waiting for Details.*

⚠️ We did not detect extortion details in your message.

Please write **everything in a single consolidated message** when you are ready (including extortionist phone numbers, bank accounts, amounts, etc.), or send us an explanatory audio.

*If you wish to cancel the current report, type **"cancel"**.*
portal.chatTooShort: ⚠️ *Description too short.* For our AI agents to perform a coherent forensic analysis, please describe the facts more broadly (minimum 20 characters) or attach a valid file.
portal.chatTrackPrompt:
🔍 *Report Tracking.*

Please write your tracking code (e.g., `TRJ-AFEZ`) in the chat and press send.
portal.chatCodeDetected:
🔍 I detected a tracking code: *{{code}}*.

You can check the status of the AI analysis and blockchain custody directly in our tracking portal by clicking the button below.
portal.chatGenericResponse:
🤖 *Hello. To process a formal extortion report, we must first activate the assistant.*

Please press the **"Start Secure Report"** button in the first message above, or type "report" to start.
portal.chatCaseProcessedDesc: Your report has been analyzed by AI agents and immutably sealed on the zkSYS blockchain.
portal.tipsPhonesDesc: Include all numbers that contacted you.
portal.tipsBankDesc: Account or CCI numbers where deposits are requested.
portal.tipsAmountsDesc: How much was demanded and when the extortion occurred.
portal.tipsEvidenceDesc: Attach audios, chat screenshots or documents.
portal.footerText: IntelExtorsión v1.0.0 · Trujillo, Peru · zkSYS Tanenbaum Testnet

tracking.title: Report Tracking
tracking.searchDesc: Enter the TRJ-XXXX code provided by the bot or Portal to verify its analysis and preservation status.
tracking.errorNotFound: Could not find the specified tracking code. Please verify it is correct.
tracking.analysisCompleteDesc: The autonomous agent system has completed the forensic analysis and legal registration of the evidence. Your tracking code and digital identity (DID) protect your rights and the veracity of the process.
tracking.caseResolvedDesc: The National Police has attended and resolved your report. The case has been successfully archived. We appreciate your citizen collaboration.
tracking.footer: IntelExtorsión. Citizen report custody and preservation. zkSYS Tanenbaum Testnet.
